# Historical Contributors

This file enumerates all copyright holders who contributed to the Spatula codebase
prior to the public repository flip on 2026-05-20.

## Sole Copyright Holder

**Salar Sayyad**

## Verification

The following command confirms a single author name across all commits in this
repository:

```
git log --format='%an' | sort -u
```

Output (run 2026-05-20):

```
Salar Sayyad
```

## Conclusion

There is only one contributor. No third-party pre-sign outreach is required.
All copyright in this repository is held by the sole author. The `LICENSE`
copyright line has been updated to reflect the legal entity
**Accidentally Awesome Labs**, which is the registered business entity under which
Salar Sayyad operates.
